reviews.review_title: I think the game is hacked
reviews.review_description:
I made a video on this already but didn’t post  it,
Everything is red and it gives you the option to jump down. I’m not sure if I’m supposed to jump and it will make everything normal again, but I’m also not sure if it’ll corrupt the game even more. If these are the real devs who did this I need an explanation. Tell me if I should jump, or stay in the area.

I love this game it's cool
for some reason my capulegacy is full of red stuff outside and the bridges are moving up and down. I don’t know how to fix this and there’s a weird sound is this a bug or the game?
You just need to jump down, and go into stump, and once you do, you will get teleported to the actual game

Everything was almost exactly how it was, besides some minor additions like ragdolling, the big window that you can go in inside of shop and some other minor stuff. Everything new makes the game so much better,  besides minor bugs which I'm sure we'll get patched soon.

Over all if you loved original capuchin you will love this!

Thank you amazing dev team for bringing this back!

reviews.review_title: Amazing game, and CBB + his team r goats
reviews.review_description: First off, this game is an amazing, legal recreation of the original Capuchin. While it has its flaws, its amazing gameplay makes up for it. Now, onto the owners, specifically CBB, he has helped me and my game without even really knowing it. Him and his team are VERY polite and nice, which is asking a lot in this generation. In the end, this game isn't anything like your typical gorilla tag "slop" fangames, it has a lot of time, money, and effort put into it, and they deserve to have a community.

reviews.review_title: Amazing! i have a question for the devs.
reviews.review_description: This is amazing. But i have a question for the developers. I got flung out of the map in level 2 and saw the whole world, and where the gate is, there is a pit that goes down into a room. Will there be a level 3?
Why is everything red and corrupted

I’ve been really looking forward to this game I’ve been missing og capuchin and this gives me back so much memories of og capuchin thank you to the owner you guys are the best and thank you duttbust for making this happen for us we really appreciate thank you so much and thank you everyone for putting all this hard work into this game thank you so much I really recommend it if you love og capuchin love this game. Capuchin forever

developer_response.body: Hello, sorry to hear this. Unfortunately, this is out of our control. Please, join the discord and make a report ticket for people doing this in game. We hope later on in the future you can reconsider this review!

reviews.review_description: This game brings back so much nostalgia from 4-5 years ago but about the would not recommend part is that I am now drenched in sweat and I have back pain from doing monkey marathon in horror level 2.
